description: Replace batch file drops with an event-driven ingestion path: devices and partner systems publish telemetry to Azure Event Hubs or Service Bus; Container Apps workers enrich and project into Azure Data Explorer or SQL for analytics; Power BI serves operations dashboards. Goal: sub-minute lag from ingest to operational visibility with clear cost guardrails.
constraints: At-least-once delivery with idempotent consumers everywhere
PII minimization: device identifiers hashed or tokenized before hot storage
Network path must support private Link for data plane where applicable
requiredCapabilities: Horizontal scale-out of processors without coordinated stops
Replay capability for forensic reprocessing within retention policy
assumptions: Upstream producers can stagger schema changes behind versioned envelopes
Operations team adopts Infrastructure as Code for all Azure resources
inlineRequirements: Define throughput SLO before peak season (marketing campaign)
topologyHints: Prefer Service Bus topics for fan-out governance rules; Event Hubs for high-volume telemetry spikes
securityBaselineHints: Workload identity between Azure resources; deny key-based SAS where managed identity fits
